use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action buttons with visual warning styling
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and navigation
Loading states for async operations with disabled interaction
Shimmer and glow variants for premium hero sections
ai_summary: A versatile atomic button component with 8 variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link, shimmer, and glow styles. Built on shadcn/ui patterns with CVA (Class Variance Authority) for type-safe variant composition. Features loading state, left/right icon slots, and responsive sizing options for desktop and mobile platforms.
